testcase.name: apply_waivers::apply_waivers.py::file_exists
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py suite=apply_waivers phase=case type=file_exists warning=False message=File exists

testcase.name: apply_waivers::apply_waivers.py::python_compiles
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py suite=apply_waivers phase=case type=py_compile warning=False message=Python compilation succeeded

testcase.name: apply_waivers::apply_waivers.py::cli_help_flag
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py suite=apply_waivers phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py --help Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- usage: apply_waivers.py [-h] [--quiet] suite_name json_file [waiver_file] [output_json_file]
Apply waivers to test suite JSON results.
positional arguments: suite_name Name of the test suite json_file Path to the JSON file waiver_file Path to the waiver file (default: waiver.json) output_json_file Path to the test category file (default: None)
options: -h, --help show this help message and exit --quiet Suppress detailed output --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: apply_waivers::apply_waivers.py::cli_missing_json_file_returns_zero_with_warning
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py suite=apply_waivers phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py FWTS /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/4_cli_missing_json_file_returns_zero_with_warning/missing.json Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- WARNING: Failed to read or parse /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/4_cli_missing_json_file_returns_zero_with_warning/missing.json: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/4_cli_missing_json_file_returns_zero_with_warning/missing.json' --- STDERR ---

file=common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py suite=apply_waivers phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py FWTS /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/5_fwts_suite_level_waiver_marks_failed_subtest/fwts.json /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/5_fwts_suite_level_waiver_marks_failed_subtest/waiver.json Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- Suite-level waiver applied to subtest 'failure one' with reason: Known FWTS issue Waivers successfully applied and '/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/5_fwts_suite_level_waiver_marks_failed_subtest/fwts.json' has been updated. --- STDERR ---

file=common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py suite=apply_waivers phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py FWTS /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/6_testsuite_level_waiver_applies_only_to_matching_testsuite/fwts.json /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/6_testsuite_level_waiver_applies_only_to_matching_testsuite/waiver.json Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- TestSuite-level waiver applied to subtest 'alpha' in TestSuite 'MatchSuite' with reason: Specific suite waiver Waivers successfully applied and '/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/6_testsuite_level_waiver_applies_only_to_matching_testsuite/fwts.json' has been updated. --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: apply_waivers::apply_waivers.py::standalone_subtest_description_waiver_applies
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py suite=apply_waivers phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/apply_waivers.py Standalone /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/10_standalone_subtest_description_waiver_applies/standalone.json /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/10_standalone_subtest_description_waiver_applies/waiver.json Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- ERROR: Waiver for Test_case 'ethtool_test' is missing 'Reason'. Skipping Test_case-level waiver. Subtest-level waiver applied to subtest 'Ping to www.arm.com on eth0' with reason: Network stack excluded for this SKU Waivers successfully applied and '/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/10_standalone_subtest_description_waiver_applies/standalone.json' has been updated. --- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check regex: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/10_standalone_subtest_description_waiver_applies/standalone.json matches '"sub_test_result": "[^"]*WITH WAIVER[^"]*"' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/10_standalone_subtest_description_waiver_applies/standalone.json contains 'Network stack excluded for this SKU' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/10_standalone_subtest_description_waiver_applies/standalone.json contains '"total_failed": 0' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/apply_waivers/apply_waivers/10_standalone_subtest_description_waiver_applies/standalone.json contains '"total_failed_with_waiver": 1' -> PASS
